name: RamHacks 2026
based_on: A 36-hour student hackathon in the MLH ecosystem (think MHacks / UofTHacks) — hundreds of students, a weekend build sprint, sponsor prize tracks, MLH code of conduct.
summary: An energetic landing site for a 36-hour student hackathon with a live countdown to kickoff, a two-day toggleable schedule, prize tracks, tiered sponsors, and an FAQ.
sections: Hero with event name, host school, dates, and a live countdown timer to kickoff
About — what a hackathon is, who can join, team size, cost (free)
Schedule — 36-hour timeline with a Saturday/Sunday day toggle (opening ceremony, workshops, midnight snack, judging, closing)
Prizes & tracks — grand prize plus sponsor category prizes (Best Beginner Hack, Best Use of AI, etc.)
Sponsors — tiered logos (Title / Gold / Startup) with 'Sponsor us' CTA
FAQ accordion (do I need experience, what to bring, travel reimbursement)
Footer with MLH Code of Conduct link and Discord/social links
setup_questions: What's the hackathon called and which school or org is hosting?
When does it start, and how long does it run (e.g. 36 hours starting Sat 10am)?
What are the prize amounts and any sponsor track names?
Who are your sponsors (a few names is fine)?
photo_terms: students coding at hackathon late night laptops
hackathon team brainstorming sticky notes whiteboard
hackathon winners holding oversized check on stage
